title: torch-nvenc-compress: GPU NVENC silicon as a PCIe bandwidth multiplier — PCA + pure-ctypes Video Codec SDK wrapper. Parallel-path overlap measured at 67% of theoretical max on a real GEMM + encode workload. [P]
author: Reddit r/MachineLearning
summary: torch-nvenc-compress leverages idle NVIDIA NVENC/NVDEC hardware to compress LLM/diffusion activations and KV cache on-the-fly using PCA preprocessing and a low-overhead pure-ctypes Video Codec SDK wrapper, turning GPU video silicon into a PCIe bandwidth multiplier. It achieves up to 6.1× lossless compression and 67% of theoretical parallel-path overlap between compute and encoding, enabling significant effective bandwidth gains in multi-GPU and networked inference scenarios.
